case_title: OPPER, JON D.D.S. TWO RINCON CENTER VS VANTAGE MED.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY OPPER, JON D.D.S. TWO RINCON CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT VANTAGE MED. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VANTAGE MED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPPER, JON D.D.S. TWO RINCON CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VANTAGE MED. $4,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $34.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,784.00, THE CONTRACT, DATED AUG. 29, 1997 BETWEEN JON OPPER, DDS AND TREND SIERRA SYSTEMS IS HEREBY RESCINDED. POS WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
